name: sidescroller-tileset
description: Focused side-scroller terrain, platform edge, props, and background recipe.

defaults.style: cohesive side-scroller pixel art tiles, crisp 16x16 grid, readable repeating texture, no antialiasing
defaults.palette: moss green, dark soil, ancient brick, clear blue highlights, warm cream

qa: Check repeating platform edges for seams.
Confirm upper/lower/transition tiles are visually distinct.
Use inpaint/edit passes for only the broken area, not the whole sheet.

payload.lower_description: solid platform wall: ancient dirt and brick, {{palette}}, {{style}}
payload.transition_description: top edge: moss grass and carved stone trim, clean collision edge, {{palette}}, {{style}}

payload.lower_description: dark cave platform wall with embedded crystals and fossils, {{palette}}, {{style}}
payload.transition_description: rocky lip and moss top edge, readable collision line, {{palette}}, {{style}}

assets.prompt: wide low-contrast parallax background for {{brief}}, distant hills, old ruins, readable silhouettes, not distracting behind gameplay, {{style}}, {{palette}}
